name: @codey/desktop
description: Codey Desktop task manager built with Tauri

scripts.build:host: esbuild src-host/automation-host.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --sourcemap --outfile=dist-host/automation-host.js --alias:@codey/state-machine=../state-machine/src/index.ts --alias:playwright-core/lib/zipBundle=patchright-core/lib/zipBundle --alias:chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/bidiMapper/BidiMapper=./src-host/chromium-bidi-stub.ts --alias:chromium-bidi/lib/cjs/cdp/CdpConnection=./src-host/chromium-bidi-stub.ts --banner:js="import { createRequire as __codeyCreateRequire } from 'node:module';import { fileURLToPath as __codeyFileURLToPath } from 'node:url';import { dirname as __codeyDirname } from 'node:path';const require = __codeyCreateRequire(import.meta.url);const __filename = __codeyFileURLToPath(import.meta.url);const __dirname = __codeyDirname(__filename);"
